titleStmt.title: SII 34.216: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 216. Sembāṭṭūr, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruvāruḍaiyār temple.

summary.p: The king granted one vēli of land, on the request of his son-in-law Aḻagapperumāḷ, as tax-free dēvadāna for offerings to the gods Tiruvaiyāṟuḍaiya-Nāyaṉār, Kūttāḍundēvar and Tambirāṭṭiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravatti kOṉEriṉmai koṇṭāṉ kuḷamaṅkala nāṭṭuc cempāṭāṉa cempiyaṉ puttā
pūr Uṭaiyār tiruvaiyyuṭaiya nāyaṉār kōyil tēvakaṉmikkum civappirāmaṇakkum Ittēvarkkum I
kkōyil kūttāṭuvākkum tampirāṭṭiyarkkum tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu vēṇṭun nivanttaṅkaḷukku Ivvūr
kaṭaimaiyiṟukkuṅ kōlāl Oru vēli nilam patiṉ Ēḻāvatu mutal Antarāyam vuṭpaṭa tēvatāṉa Iṟaiyili Āy yi
ṟuppatāka Iṭappeṟavēṇumeṉṟu marumakanār Aḻakapperumāṉ namakkuc connamaiyil Ittēvarkku
Ikkōyil kūttāṭuvarkkum nampirāṭṭiyarkkum tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu vēṇṭun nimantaṅkaḷukku Innilamoru vē
liyum Ivvāṇṭu mutal Anta ra tēvatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyā yiṟuppata connōm Itu
kai koṇṭu tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu vēṇṭun nimantaṅkaḷuñ cella ṇa nti rātittavarai Ā
ka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka § Ivai maturōtaya vaḷa nāṭṭu kē Ukkuṭi cuntarat
tōḷaṉ muttaṉāna teṉṉavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 10 8 vatu ṉāḷ 3 100 6 10 lirukaraiṉāṭṭu Accu
ta Araiyaṉ teyvaccilaiyāṉāṉa Ivai Aṇṭanāṭṭu maṅ Uṭaiyāṉ mantiri I
rāmaṉṉāṉa pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.216 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
